AttendanceRecord.title: Attendance Record
AttendanceRecord.description: A map of roll numbers to attendance status

/users/{userId}/classes/{classId}.description: Collection of classes for a specific user

/users/{userId}/attendance/{classId}_{da.description: Attendance mapping for a class on a specific date

/users/{userId}/onDays/{classId}_{dateKe.description: Status indicating if a specific date is a working day
